commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway dashboard and incident APIs, a tool activity registry, dashboard delta scheduling, overview polling, and Mission Control panels for tool runtime, execution queue, and autonomy posture.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review blockers by source inspection: the branch records global tool events before a dashboard visibility filter, registers dashboard callbacks before requestContext assignment, and ignores data.isError when finalizing result events. I did not run a live gateway or browser setup in this read-only review.
